description:
You are a biomedical data engineer auditing VitalDB case #6 for a research database. Examine the Solar8000/PLETH_SPO2 track (pulse oximetry SpO2) across the entire recording in Vital Recorder to identify all signal dropout episodes (no data, flat-line at zero, or trace disappears) lasting 10 seconds or longer.

Create a structured report at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\dropout_report.txt using the following format, with times relative to the recording start (00:00:00):

SIGNAL DROPOUT REPORT
=====================
Case: VitalDB #6
Track: Solar8000/PLETH_SPO2
Date of Audit: [today's date]

Total dropout episodes found: [N]

Episode 1:
  Start: [HH:MM:SS]
  End: [HH:MM:SS]
  Duration: [seconds]

[...for each episode...]

Total dropout time: [seconds]
Signal availability: [percentage]%
